title: Phusion HotStart II Hifi PCR
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"bnnl5","text":"PCR using Phusion HotStart II Hifi Mastermix (based on ThermoFisher Scientific manufacturer protocol).","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: In a PCR tube, combine following components for a 50 uL reaction. Ensure all components are mixed and thawed. Mastermix (2X) - 25 uL Template DNA - 1 pg -10 ng Forward primer - to final concentration of 0.2-0.5 uM Reverse primer - to final concentration of 0.2-0.5 uM Water - to 50 uL
Set up the reaction: 1. 98 C - 2 min 2. 98 C - 10 sec 3. Tm + 3 - 30 sec 4. 72 C - 15-30 sec/kb -> cycle back to 2, 25-35 cycles 5. 72 C - 10 min 6. 4 C - hold
Visualize results of PCR, conduct gel electrophoresis.
creator: Snehadri Sinha
